title: emmeno #1696
definition:
1) to remain in, continue
 2) to persevere in anything, a state of mind etc.
 3) to hold fast, to be true to, abide by, keep
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to remain in, continue
 2) to persevere in anything, a state of mind etc.
 3) to hold fast, to be true to, abide by, keep

    NASB:  to abide in, fig. to be true to, to persevere:
